subject: feat(core): rename Budget → Workspace and add demo workspace
body:
Renamed the top-level entity from "Budget" to "Workspace" across the entire
codebase to better reflect that the tool is a cashflow planning tool, not just
a budget tracker. Added a demo workspace with realistic South African household
data (salary, rent, groceries, etc.) that auto-seeds on first visit.

Key changes:
- Types: Budget → Workspace, budgetId → workspaceId, added isDemo field
- DB migration v4: creates workspaces table, migrates data, renames FKs
- 5 view files renamed (BudgetListView → WorkspaceListView, etc.)
- Routes: /budget/ → /workspace/, budget-* → workspace-*
- Engine functions renamed (exportBudget → exportWorkspace, etc.)
- Backward-compatible import accepts both old and new format keys
- New src/db/demoData.ts seeds 16-item demo household on empty DB
- All 94 tests pass, build clean

Tags: rename, workspace, demo, migration, ux
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: workspace-rename
Semver: major

title: rename Budget → Workspace and add demo workspace
